name: Tom
manager_notes: Tom moved teams recently and delivery is steady, but Principal-level impact is not visible yet. Previous feedback said he needs early expectation alignment, and he still asks very few questions. I want to test whether he understands what Principal scope means on this team or if he is still operating on old assumptions. I also need to understand whether cross-team trust and judgment calls are developing or whether he is staying in safe execution mode.
answers: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.
I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
The gap is less technical and more around visible ownership.
I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.
